item.title: That Same Ol Song and Dance Dump
item.description:
**Klangphonics ^ Happy Hump Day!
If you know any of these artists, drop their name and I will credit them accordingly!
I hope you're all doing well this week
**Left: Nati Dreddd. Right: Seth Staton Watkin Enjoy the tunes/performances!
Tenacious D - Heavy Metal
**@beholdyourfate on bandcamp! <3
**Verbalase .
Hell yeah
:)
.
.
.
Would.
.
A classic!
Hope you enjoyed this dump! I can't pole dance, but I can do other things °3* If you want to help a girly out financially and receive some fun pics/vids in return, message me! Thanks and see you Friday!
item.dc:creator: FlexxyLexxy

item.dc:creator: boardfuniguess

item.title: Marceline The Vampire Queen - Adventure Time Cosplay
item.description:
Have you heard the news? Starting January 1st, this is my full time job... I know what you might be thinking - Is it not already? The crazy answer, nope - I have been working about an 80 hour a week job on top of my cosplay and modeling life for the last ten years... I don't know how I have made it this long... It's a big scary leap, but one I am so ready for. It's going to mean so many more cosplays soon, as well as just a bigger overall online presence, and hopefully a much happier existence. Thank you all for your support through the years, and feel free to support me on my other socials if you feel up for it, no pressure... But there is about to be a hell of a lot more of me everywhere lol
Reference Image from the Episode "What Was Missing"
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Happy THT <3
item.description: 1 more week til thanksgiving <3 I fly back home to see my family this friday, so excited for all the food (and my family ofc.) Hope youre having a good week and nice holidays to look forward to :)
item.dc:creator: walpurrga
